Executive Summary
CRITICAL: EMT Solar's collection rate of 87.40% is significantly below the 98% LightReach target. 42 past-due accounts require immediate intervention.
  • Collection rate 87.40% -- BELOW the 98% LightReach target (-10.60%)
  • 42 past-due accounts (30+ days) with delinquency rate of 12.6%
  • Month-over-month trend: PD rate increasing (+24%)
  • NPS Score: +57 based on 0 responses (0 promoters, 0 detractors)
  • Current pipeline: 49 NTPs in last 30 days
  • Paused transactions: $484,156 in held revenue

Immediate Actions
  • Weekly monitoring of 42 past-due accounts
  • ACH enrollment verification for delinquent accounts
  • Proactive outreach for accounts approaching 60 days
  • Target: Reduce delinquency rate from 12.6% to <2%
Palmetto LightReach  |  Confidential  |  March 2026
Phased Implementation

Process Improvements

  • Weekly delinquency monitoring cadence
  • Proactive outreach at 45-day mark
  • ACH re-enrollment for dropped accounts
  • Monthly trend review with PLR RM

Growth Opportunities

  • Energy Backup cross-sell assessment
  • NPS improvement plan
  • Solar 3.0 positioning for all product lines
  • Channel tier advancement evaluation
